title: Outlook Add-in deployment pipeline from pilot to company-wide rollout

tuw_evidence.title: Create and validate Outlook Add-in manifest
Deploy Add-in to pilot group through admin center
Run pilot mailbox read-mode filing E2E and release gate precheck
Write Add-in deployment runbook and assemble W09 evidence

commands.command: jq -r '.work_packages[] | select(.wp_id=="LT-L1-W02" or .wp_id=="LT-L1-W10" or .wp_id=="LT-L2-W03" or .wp_id=="LT-L3-W06" or .wp_id=="LT-L3-W07" or .wp_id=="LT-L3-W08") | [.wp_id,.evidence.command_status,.evidence.classification] | @tsv' docs/launch/launch-tuw-status-audit.json
commands.purpose: Verify W09 predecessor state before claiming blocker evidence.

commands.command: test -d apps/outlook-addin; printf '%s\n' $?; test -d apps/addin; printf '%s\n' $?; find apps -maxdepth 4 -type f \( -iname '*manifest*.xml' -o -iname '*manifest*.json' \) -print | wc -l
commands.purpose: Verify Outlook Add-in app directories and manifest files are absent.

commands.command:
test -f docs/launch/l3/addin-release-gate-precheck.md; printf '%s
' $?; test -f docs/launch/l3/graph-failure-rehearsal.md; printf '%s
' $?; test -f docs/runbooks/addin-deployment-runbook.md; printf '%s
' $?
commands.purpose: Verify W09 release-gate, failure rehearsal, and runbook docs are absent.

commands.command: find docs/launch/l3 docs/runbooks docs/goal-closeout/lt-l3-w09 -maxdepth 2 -type f \( -iname '*addin*' -o -iname '*add-in*' -o -iname '*outlook*' -o -iname '*graph-failure*' \) -print 2>/dev/null | wc -l
commands.purpose: Verify no W09 launch evidence files exist.

commands.command: rg -n "no evidence directory|No Add-in deployment|No Microsoft 365 admin center setting|pending_m365_admin_export|LT-L3-W09" docs/goal-closeout/lt-l7-w05/pilot-kickoff-checklist.md docs/goal-closeout/lt-l7-w05/command-evidence.json docs/goal-closeout/lt-l8-w02/gate-evidence/g5.md
output_summary: L7 pilot kickoff checklist says W09 Add-in pilot deployment evidence directory is not found.
L7 pilot evidence says no Add-in deployment was performed.
L7 pilot evidence says no Microsoft 365 admin center setting was changed.
commands.purpose: Verify downstream pilot docs also treat W09 deployment evidence as absent.
Verify current M365 runtime contract does not admit Add-in/Graph runtime.

commands.summary: TUW total 344, WP total 72, violations 0, PASS

blocked_claims: This record does not close LT-L3-W09.
This record does not create Outlook Add-in code, Office.js task pane runtime, or manifest files.
This record does not validate a manifest or compare manifest permissions to approved Graph scopes.
This record does not deploy through Microsoft 365 admin center or verify mailbox visibility.
This record does not run read-mode filing E2E, release gate precheck, Graph-failure rehearsal, or rollback.
This record does not satisfy G5 or L3-EXIT.
This record does not treat the user review waiver as valid review evidence.
